use axum::{extract::State, Json};
use std::sync::Arc;

struct AppState {
    db_pool: sqlx::PgPool,
    cache: dashmap::DashMap<String, Vec<u8>>,
    config: AppConfig,
}

struct AppConfig {
    feature_flags: Vec<String>,
    limits: Vec<(String, u64)>,
}

// BAD: Axum State extraction clones heavy AppState per request
async fn handler(State(state): State<AppState>) -> Json<serde_json::Value> {
    Json(serde_json::json!({ "ok": true }))
}
